chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No. 397 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ For orders as to non-prosecution of Reference. 24.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Bilal Bhatti, advocate for applicant. This reference is pending since 2018 without any progress. Notice was issued back in 2022, however, till date the matter remains listed for non-prosecution. Even today, no reason is articulated by learned counsel and merely seeks time. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with this matter, therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
